name: Char Flavoured Potatoes and Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups green beans, cut into 1 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the ingredients into a large heavy-bottomed pot in the order listed.
2. Bring to a boil over moderate heat, then reduce heat and continue boiling for 5 minutes.
3. Reduce the heat further and gently boil, partially covered, for 20 to 25 minutes. Check that the water is not evaporating too quickly; add more water if necessary.
4. To finish cooking, raise the heat to high and fry quickly without stirring to allow the crust to form and begin to char. Remove from the heat and let stand, covered, for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the crust and serve, remembering to remove the red chilies (you may not want to bite into them).
